initial_candidates.sql:
WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN most_influential_user m ON p.OwnerUserId = m.Id;

WITH top_user AS (
  SELECT Id AS user_id
  FROM users
  ORDER BY Reputation DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_user_posts AS (
  SELECT Score
  FROM posts
  WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT user_id FROM top_user)
)
SELECT 
  CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM top_user_posts;

WITH top_user AS (
  SELECT Id AS user_id
  FROM users
  ORDER BY Reputation DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN top_user tu ON p.OwnerUserId = tu.user_id;

WITH top_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_user_posts AS (
    SELECT Score
    FROM posts
    WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM top_user)
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM top_user_posts;

WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN most_influential_user m ON p.OwnerUserId = m.Id;
